bugs: The /events/[eventId]/settings page did not convert inaccessible or cross-event access failures into notFound(), so it could reject inaccessible events inconsistently with the workspace route.
notes: Added route-level notFound handling and packet-specific page coverage. npx tsc --noEmit still fails due unrelated pre-existing repo-wide errors outside PKT-A-002 scope.

bugs: The registration settings UI saved `approvalRequired` and `waitlistEnabled`, but the public registration action still read legacy keys, so approval and waitlist behavior never changed for saved events.
Saved cutoff dates were not consumed by the public registration surfaces, so registration could remain open past the configured close date.
notes: Normalized saved registration setting keys in the public registration action, enforced cutoff-date closure, and updated public registration surfaces to reflect the closed state. Packet-focused vitest checks passed; repo-wide npm run test:run and npx tsc --noEmit still fail due pre-existing issues outside PKT-A-003 scope.
